empty.title: No Knowledge Base
empty.desc: No knowledge base yet, go create one~
dialog.name: Name
dialog.folder.create.title: New Folder
dialog.edit.title: Edit Info
dialog.move.title: Root Directory
dialog.rename.title: Rename
detail.info.desc: This knowledge base has no introduction yet~
dataset.col.name: Name
dataset.delete.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this file and all its data?
dataset.empty.title: Dataset is empty
dataset.empty.desc: No datasets yet, go create one~
imageDataset.name.label: Dataset Name
imageDataset.upload.uploading: Please wait for the image upload to complete
textDataset.col.name: File Name
textDataset.upload.nameTooLongTooltip: The file name is too long. Please delete it, edit the name, and upload again. The file name cannot exceed 100 characters.
textDataset.upload.nameTooLongError: There are files with names that are too long. Please check and try again.
textDataset.upload.sameNameTooltip: The default file name is the vector dataset name. A file with the same name already exists in the current knowledge base hierarchy. Please check and upload again.
textDataset.upload.sameNameError: File already exists. Please check and upload again.
textDataset.settings.pdf.desc: Enhance PDF structure to improve parsing accuracy and stability.
textDataset.settings.chunk.desc: Split long text into chunks and store for better indexing and recall.
textDataset.settings.qa.desc: Extract potential QA pairs from documents for retrieval enhancement.
textDataset.settings.condition.desc: Chunking only when original text length meets condition.
textDataset.settings.index.title: Add title to index
textDataset.settings.index.title.desc: Add headings to index to improve positioning and recall.
textDataset.settings.index.auto.desc: Auto-generate supplementary index for weak coverage areas.
textDataset.settings.index.image.desc: Generate searchable index info for images in documents.
textDataset.settings.default.desc: Use system default parameters and rules
textDataset.settings.auto.desc: Enable model recognition when text contains no Markdown headings.
textDataset.settings.force.desc: Force use model paragraph recognition and ignore original paragraphs if any
textDataset.settings.indexSize.help: The length of content during vectorization. The system will automatically further split the chunk based on this size.
searchConfig.rerank.desc: Use rerank model for secondary sorting to enhance comprehensive ranking.
searchConfig.token.limit: Max token count per search. Chinese approx 1 char = 1.7 tokens, English approx 1 char = 1 token.
searchConfig.similarity.desc: Relevance varies by index model. Please use search test to find suitable value. When using rerank, rerank result is used for filtering.
searchConfig.desc.tooltip: Describe current dialogue scope to help AI complete and extend the question. Content usually used by the assistant.
training.action.deleteContent: Are you sure you want to delete this data?
searchConfig.title: Knowledge Base Search Config
searchConfig.method.semantic.desc: Use vectors for text relevance query
searchConfig.method.fulltext.desc: Use traditional full-text search, suitable for finding specific keywords.
searchConfig.method.hybrid.desc: Use combined results of vector and full-text search, sorted by RRF algorithm.
searchConfig.rerank.title: Result Rerank
searchConfig.qopt.desc: Enable question optimization to improve search accuracy in continuous dialogue. When enabled, AI will complete missing information in questions based on dialogue history.
searchTest.history.title: Test History
searchTest.history.tooltip: The history will only keep data within 30 days
searchTest.params.title: Test Parameters
searchTest.result.title: Test Results
training.title: Parsing Status
message.addImageSuccess: Images added successfully, please wait for training to complete before they are displayed
dialog.delete.title: Delete Warning
dialog.delete.content: Are you sure you want to delete this knowledge base? Data cannot be recovered after deletion!
dialog.delete.folder.content: Are you sure you want to delete this folder and all its knowledge bases? Data cannot be recovered after deletion!
dialog.folder.edit.title: Edit Folder
dialog.folder.name.label: Folder Name
dialog.folder.desc.label: Folder Description
dialog.create.knowledge.title: Create General Knowledge Base
dialog.knowledge.name.label: Knowledge Base Name
dialog.knowledge.embedding.desc1: Embedding models convert natural language into vectors for semantic retrieval.
dialog.knowledge.embedding.desc2: Note: Different embedding models cannot be used together and cannot be changed after selection.
dialog.knowledge.text.desc: Used for enhancing indexing and QA generation
dialog.knowledge.legal.notice: Please ensure your content strictly complies with relevant laws and regulations to avoid containing any illegal or copyright-infringing content. Please be cautious when uploading materials that may involve sensitive information.
dialog.move.warning: After moving, the selected knowledge base/folder will inherit the permission settings of the new folder.
detail.model.confirmSwitch.title: Operation Confirmation
detail.model.confirmSwitch.content1: Confirm to switch index for knowledge base?
detail.model.confirmSwitch.content2: Switching index is a heavy operation requiring re-indexing of all data in your knowledge base. It may take a long time, please ensure you have enough points.
detail.model.confirmSwitch.content3: Also, please note to modify applications using this knowledge base to avoid mixing with other index model knowledge bases.
searchConfig.desc.placeholder:
E.g.:
    Questions about Python introduction and usage.
    Current dialogue is related to game GTA5.
searchTest.empty: Test results will be shown here
searchTest.result.tooltip1: Sorted by similarity between knowledge base content and test text. You can adjust text based on results.
searchTest.result.tooltip2: Note:\n                        Data in test records may have been modified. Click on a test record to show the latest data.
textDataset.preview.clickToPreview: Click file on the left to preview
textDataset.settings.pdf.help: Call PDF recognition model for parsing, convert to Markdown and retain images, also supports scanned documents. Recognition takes longer.
textDataset.settings.chunk.help: Split text into segments by rules, convert to semantic search format, suitable for most scenarios. No extra model processing needed, low cost.
textDataset.settings.qa.help: Split text into large paragraphs by rules, use AI to generate QA pairs. High retrieval accuracy but may lose details.
textDataset.settings.condition.help: Trigger chunking only when conditions met, otherwise store original text completely.
textDataset.settings.gt.context: Original length > 70% of file processing model context
textDataset.settings.index.title.help: Automatically add title to all indexes
textDataset.settings.index.auto.help: Generate extra index via LLM to improve semantic richness and retrieval accuracy.
textDataset.settings.index.image.help: Use VLM to label images in docs and generate extra retrieval index
textDataset.settings.byParagraph.help: Prioritize chunking by Markdown headers, if too long, secondary chunking by length
textDataset.settings.bySeparator.help: Allows chunking by custom separators. Usually for pre-processed data. Use | for multiple separators, e.g. "。|." for Chinese/English periods. Avoid regex special chars like *()[]{}.
textDataset.settings.separator.question: Question Mark
imageDataset.upload.label: Upload Image
datasetDetail.trainingNotAllowModify: Dataset is training, modification of training parameters is not allowed
datasetDetail.meta.name: Dataset Name
datasetDetail.meta.title: Metadata
datasetDetail.addImageDialog.title: Add Image
insertDialog.question: Question
